title: Day 17 Human Review Activation Readiness Gate

items.title: Day16 merged baseline
items.finding: Day16 is merged through PR #6 and CP0/CP1 remain complete.

items.title: Public and restricted identity separation
items.finding: Public role codes are separated from restricted identity and contact records.

items.title: Eight-role accountability definitions
items.finding: Responsibility, capability, limits, and public role codes are defined.

items.title: Small-team separation-of-duties profile
items.finding: Conditional combinations and absolute separation rules are explicit.

items.title: Nomination and acceptance workflow
items.finding: Ten activation states and required checks are defined.

items.title: Human-use approval routes
items.finding: Seven protocols have primary and independent approval roles.

items.title: Evidence environment deployment plan
items.finding: Eight controls have owners, deployment states, and verification gates.

items.title: CP2 readiness plan
items.finding: Staff rehearsal prerequisites and scenario scope are defined.

items.title: Named-accountability tabletop execution
items.finding: Ten synthetic scenarios passed with no real evidence.

items.title: Real role nominations
items.finding: No person has been nominated through the restricted process.

items.title: Role acceptance and checks
items.finding: No acceptance, qualification, conflict, or independence checks are complete.

items.title: Minimum distinct-person topology staffed
items.finding: No real person is assigned to the minimum topology.

items.title: Human-use protocol approvals
items.finding: No named primary or independent approver exists.

items.title: Restricted evidence environment deployed
items.finding: No live control is provisioned or verified.

items.title: Jurisdiction and professional qualification
items.finding: No operating context and qualified reviewer are approved.

items.title: Independent facilitator assignment
items.finding: No conflict-free facilitator has accepted the role.

requires: Restricted nominations for all required roles
Voluntary acceptance, scope, expiry, and backup records
Separate qualified jurisdiction and professional review
Seven human-use protocol approvals as applicable to CP2
Evidence environment provisioned and verified for the authorized scope
